basicDetails.schemeName: Weekly Iron Folic Acid Tablets Free Distribution - Uttarakhand

nodalDepartmentName.label: Medical Health And Family Welfare Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Weekly Iron Folic Acid Tablets Free Distribution” is an initiative under the National Health Mission (NHM) implemented by the Department of Medical Health and Family Welfare, Government of Uttarakhand. The initiative aims to improve the health and nutritional status of school-going children by preventing and reducing iron deficiency anemia.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, teachers distribute free iron and folic acid tablets every Monday to all students enrolled in government and government-aided schools across the state.
schemeContent.briefDescription: This aims to improve the health and nutritional status of school-going children by preventing and reducing iron deficiency anemia. Under this scheme, teachers distribute free iron and folic acid tablets every Monday to all students enrolled in government & government-aided schools across the state.

children.text: The scheme “Weekly Iron Folic Acid Tablets Free Distribution” is an initiative under the National Health Mission (NHM) implemented by the Department of Medical Health and Family Welfare, Government of Uttarakhand. The initiative aims to improve the health and nutritional status of school-going children by preventing and reducing iron deficiency anemia.
Under this scheme, teachers distribute free iron and folic acid tablets every Monday to all students enrolled in government and government-aided schools across the state.
The benefits of this scheme are provided to students enrolled in all government and government-aided schools.

applicationProcess.process_md: The benefits of this scheme are provided to students enrolled in all government and government-aided schools.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. All students enrolled in government and government-aided schools in Uttarakhand are eligible under this scheme.

children.text: All students enrolled in government and government-aided schools in Uttarakhand are eligible under this scheme.
